checks.finding: design.md ## Architecture (lines 16-48) gives the top-level directory/component boundary tree (index/server/root/path-guard/parsers/tools/resources/next-command), states the single-chokepoint integration rule ('すべての読み取りは path-guard.ts を必ず経由する') and the strict cannot-parse propagation rule, and the ## Components table (lines 49-62) assigns technology per layer (TypeScript + @modelcontextprotocol/sdk stdio for server, bash 3.2/PowerShell + existing installer for infra, GitHub Actions for CI). All three required elements present.

SKIP: no explicit component dependency declarations found in ## Architecture or ## Components; checked for circular import patterns in the architecture narrative (index -> server -> tools/resources -> parsers -> path-guard -> fs) and found only a one-directional flow with no back-edges.
## Data Plan (lines 89-109) provides Data Entities table (8 read-only sources), 'Existing Data Affected: なし（読み取りのみ）', and 'Migration Strategy: 不要'. All three required sub-fields present and explicit.

## API / Contract Plan (lines 111-147) defines the common response envelope with full error-code enumeration, names all 13 tools and 5 resources, shows representative data shapes for 4 tools, and names the canonical external schema contracts/sdd-forge-mcp-tools.v1.schema.json (present on disk) as the shape source of truth, plus explicit versioning policy.

## Security Boundaries (lines 166-173) names both trust boundaries (B1 client->server stdio, B2 server->filesystem), states auth/authz at each (same-user local stdio + JSON Schema validation at B1; path-guard realpath/allowlist/denylist fail-closed at B2), data classification (internal / internal-restricted for denylist), and OWASP concerns (Injection at B1, Broken Access Control and Path Traversal at B2), detailed in security-spec.md. All four required items present.
SKIP: Feature Type is api-only (design.md line 4).

## Test Strategy (lines 149-164) covers unit scope (parsers normal/cannot-parse, path-guard traversal/symlink/denylist, next-command fixtures), integration scope (MCP SDK InMemory/stdio harness, installer *.tests), acceptance verification (TEST-001 golden test tied to AC-001; TEST-011 read-only static+snapshot tied to AC-011), and concrete planned evidence (node:test, tsc --noEmit, named test directories). MCP Inspector smoke (TEST-005) serves as the e2e-equivalent path for this api-only feature.

All components referenced in ## Architecture (server/index, root, path-guard, parsers, tools/core, tools/evidence, resources, next-command) are defined in the ## Components table (lines 51-61), including the 'Existing (拡張)' installer and CI entries. No undefined component names found.

## ADR Change Log (lines 82-87) references ADR-0002 and ADR-0003; both exist on disk at docs/adr/0002-sdd-forge-mcp-readonly-server.md and docs/adr/0003-mcp-dist-bundle-distribution.md. No undeclared new architectural decisions found.
